scenario.name: UAC SUBSCRIBE Presence
scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Event: presence Accept: application/pidf+xml Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
